content.en:
The half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm went to create the Extreme Gold Mountain, and this time there was no perfect controller to lead the team.

After all, the strength of the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm is comparable to that of ordinary weaker primary half-step perfect controllers, plus most of them are will clones, so there is no need to send extremely powerful perfect controllers to protect them.

Ye Tian followed the other half-step perfection masters of the Infinite Realm of the Daoless Pagoda to the Extreme Creation Golden Mountain, and soon they arrived.

For this opportunity to create the Extreme Mountain, many half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm attach great importance to it, so many half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm have come.

However, some half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm did not come, mainly because they had other opportunities that they were reluctant to give up for the time being, and the will clone could not come, and the ontology did not dare to enter here, after all, once the ontology fell, it would really fall.

The true body of the half-step perfect controller who dares to enter the Extreme Creation Realm here is extremely powerful.

In short, a small group of half-Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect controllers have all come here.

Since the Extreme Gold Mountain had not yet been officially opened, it was covered by a faint layer of golden light, and they could not enter.

Don't look at this layer of protection is weak, but even a high-level perfect master can't break this layer of protection, after all, the original master of the ultimate is a super perfect master!

Outside the gold mountain.

An area was occupied by the Half-Step Perfection Controller of the Void Tower, and more than twenty Half-Step Perfection Masters of the Extreme Creation Realm stayed here.

At this time, a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm spoke, he was one of the almost most powerful half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm in the Wudao Tower—the Tai'er Master!

"Everyone is a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm of the Daoless Tower, and they are all brothers, so this time I must remind you that once some of the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm encounter them, they must flee as soon as possible, and do not fight with each other. Everyone is a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, as long as they are not mortal enemies, they will give face and will not pursue. Here is information about some of the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm of other forces, you can take a look. Said the Keeper of Tai'er.

In an instant, every half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm obtained a piece of information.

Ye Tian naturally also obtained this information and browsed it carefully.

This is mainly an introduction to some of the extremely powerful half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm.

For example, the Tyrannical Ancient Controller of the Scourgeon Alliance has an incomparably powerful bloodline, and he is also the heir of a super-perfect master, and his status is very high in the Scourge.

And the Tyrannical Master is even more terrifying, with an incomparably powerful defense, and once single-handedly fought against dozens of creatures comparable to the Perfect Controller without being defeated, and those Perfect Controller creatures could not break through his defenses.

According to the intelligence, the current Tyrant Ancient Masters are very likely to be comparable to the Medium Perfect Masters.

Another example is the White Moon Controller of the Xuannu Sect, who has an incomparably terrifying speed, and it is difficult for all kinds of Extreme Creation Perfect Controllers who limit speed to limit her speed, and it is difficult to attack her, so she is extremely terrifying, and ordinary half-step Extreme Creation Realm Perfect Controllers encounter her, and they can't escape.

This probably introduces more than a dozen half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, all of whom are almost invincible existences.

Ye Tian read their information and had a thought in his heart.

"These half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Realm shouldn't be the fur that has mastered the Extreme Path, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

This possibility is still very large, so these dozen or so half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm all have a very deep background, if there is the help of the elders or masters behind them, it is not impossible to go to the Extreme Dao in advance.

After all, the major forces all have super-perfect treasures, and it is still possible to give a place for enlightenment.

Of course, among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, they can perceive the extreme fur, and their talent is also extremely high.

Ye Tian has the affinity of the Dao, coupled with the medium perfect treasure Enlightenment Dao Baolian, and the comprehension is the super perfect treasure that is being conceived, the effect is so good.

If other half-step perfection masters of the Extreme Creation Realm go to the super-perfect treasure that has been conceived, the effect will definitely not be good, so it will be very difficult to comprehend.

Therefore, if the major forces were to cultivate a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm who had comprehended the skin of the Extreme Dao, it would be extremely difficult.

Time passed slowly, and finally waited for the day when the golden mountain of creation began.

this day.

A golden passage appeared in the Extreme Creation Golden Mountain, and a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm flew into the Creation Extreme Gold Mountain.

The Extreme Gold Mountain has three layers, the first layer of the area is a void opened up by the Lord of Creation, where a lot of resources are born, many of which are helpful to the perfect controller, so it is also a good harvest.

The second level area is the Ten Thousand Things Prison Cage, where many vicious ancient creatures are imprisoned, each of which has a strength comparable to that of the Perfect Master, and the Half-Step Perfect Master of the Extreme Creation Realm needs to defeat them before they can enter the third level area.

Of course, once you defeat these ancient creatures, you can get a copy of the Polar Mass, but only one copy.

The real chance was in the third-layer area, so the purpose of the half-step perfect controller who came here to create the Extreme Golden Mountain was naturally to enter the third-layer area.

Buzz Buzz!!

Many half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Creation Realm came to the first layer area.

They are not in a hurry to go to the third-layer area, because if they want to get benefits, they can't get it by entering the third-layer area first, and it has nothing to do with time.

Therefore, they are not in a hurry.

Besides, there are a lot of good things in the first layer area, and maybe if you are lucky, you can even find extreme substances, so they naturally want to stay in the first layer area for a few more days.

Soon, one by one resources were found by Ye Tian and included in his pocket.

"That's Tianyu Baolian!"

Ye Tian sensed a good thing.

The Celestial Treasure Lotus is a priceless treasure for a Primary Perfect Master, and it can make a Primary Perfect Master step from a Medium Perfect Master to a 100% level.

In terms of value, it is even higher than the value of the Ten Thousand Thunder True Fruit.

Unexpectedly, Tianyu Baolian was born here.

And at this moment, another half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm also sensed Tianyu Baolian.

The other party naturally won't give up, after all, the value of Tianyu Baolian is too high, even if you don't use it, you can take it out and trade it in exchange for the resources you need.

"Infinite Master, this Tianyu Baolian, I want it!"

The other party said directly.

Ye Tian recognized him, the Yunli Controller from the Hall of Eternal Life, there were not many half-step perfect controllers of the Eternal Ruins' Creation Realm, so the approximate name was still known.

He didn't know much about the Cloud Separation Controller, but he didn't need to know either.

"Yunli Controller, you want to snatch it with me?" Ye Tian said coldly.

"Are you going to snatch it from me?"

The Yunli Controller was furious.

He is also a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm who has practiced for countless years, and a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm like Ye Tian is just a newcomer, and he still dares to fight him?

Swish!

Yun Li rushed directly to Tianyu Baolian, too lazy to talk nonsense with Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian shot directly!
